info.name: NutriSport API — Complete Collection
info.description:
Full test collection for the Nutriweb Technical Test Laravel API.

Base URL: http://localhost:8080

Run requests in order within each folder. Login requests auto-save tokens to collection variables.

exec: pm.test('Has id and email', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.id).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(j.email).to.be.a('string'); });

item.name: 1.9 Login (IT) — re-login FR for further tests

exec: pm.test('Has id and nom', () => { var j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.id).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(j.nom).to.be.a('string'); });

item.name: 3.7 Add Multiple Products for Clear Test

exec: pm.test('Orders agent CAN view orders', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Orders agent CANNOT create products', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Catalog agent CAN create products', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));
pm.test('Catalog agent CANNOT view orders', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
